sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: The cave_system changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. Underground cave system located. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.
Population: 29. Underground cave system located. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Selene.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 66): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
